schedule.description: Story 2 — Young's 65, how the lead vanished
Story 6 — LIV Golf Mexico City preview

stories.title: Masters Sunday — McIlroy vs. Young, Back-to-Back Title on the Line

x_posts.label: Post 1-1
x_posts.text:
MASTERS SUNDAY IS HERE.

McIlroy and Young. Tied at 11-under. Final pairing at 2:25 PM ET.

Can the defending champion defend? Can Young pull off the greatest Masters comeback ever?

CBS. 2-7 PM. Don't miss it. #TheMasters #GolfFanrecap

x_posts.label: Post 1-2
x_posts.text:
Masters final round leaderboard entering Sunday:

-11: McIlroy 🏆 / Young
-10: Burns
-9: Lowry
-8: Day

Two players, one title. But Augusta will have a say in this too. #TheMasters #GolfFanrecap

article.headline: Masters Sunday: McIlroy and Young Tied at 11-Under — Everything On the Line

stories.title: Young's Historic Saturday — 65 Erases McIlroy's Six-Shot Lead

x_posts.label: Post 2
x_posts.text:
8 shots back. One round. TIED.

Cameron Young shot 7-under 65 on Saturday — 8 birdies, 1 bogey — to erase Rory McIlroy's entire 6-shot lead.

The first player in Masters history to share the 54-hole lead after starting 8 back.

Just get to Sunday. #TheMasters #GolfFanrecap

article.headline: Young's 65 Is Already One of the Great Augusta Rounds. Now He Has to Win Sunday.

stories.title: McIlroy's Grand Slam Window — What Back-to-Back Masters Would Mean

x_posts.label: Post 3
x_posts.text:
The back-to-back Masters club has 3 members:

• Jack Nicklaus (1965-66)
• Nick Faldo (1989-90)
• Tiger Woods (2001-02)

Rory McIlroy is trying to become No. 4 today.

That is the company he's keeping. #TheMasters #GolfFanrecap

article.headline: Nicklaus. Faldo. Tiger. McIlroy Is Playing for the Fourth Spot in the Back-to-Back Club

x_posts.label: Post 5
x_posts.text:
While Augusta wraps up — the LPGA rolls on.

The Ford Championship starts April 16 at El Caballero Country Club in Tarzana, CA.

Coughlin just won Aramco by 5 shots. Korda is coming for her.

Women's golf is loaded right now. #LPGA #GolfFanrecap

stories.title: LIV Golf Mexico City — April 16-19, New 72-Hole Format

x_posts.label: Post 6
x_posts.text:
LIV Golf heads to Mexico City next week.

April 16-19. Club de Golf Chapultepec.

New in 2026: 72 holes (up from 54). LIV's transformation continues.

After all 10 LIV players missed the Masters cut — can they respond? #LIVGolf #GolfFanrecap

stories.title: Augusta Traditions — The Green Jacket Ceremony and Masters Lore

x_posts.label: Post 7
x_posts.text:
The Masters green jacket goes to the winner.

If the same player wins back-to-back, a club official presents it — not the defending champion.

Also at Augusta: pimento cheese sandwiches and volunteer scoreboards.

There's no place like it. 🌸 #TheMasters #GolfFanrecap
